evidence.snippet:
LEMO produces an extensive range of high quality custom and modular connectors which provide exceptional reliability for a host of applications in the most demanding environments.
[Discover more](/en/lemo-circular-connectors)

LEMO products can be found in communication systems (antenna emitters/receivers), navigation systems (autopilot/sensor modules), power and propulsion (power supply units), cameras and surveillance systems, ground control systems (display/control panels) and counter-drone systems (radio frequency inhibitors).

items.notes: LEMO's core business is precision circular push-pull connectors and cable assemblies used as components inside UAV and aerospace systems.

evidence.snippet: LEMO products can be found in communication systems (antenna emitters/receivers), navigation systems (autopilot/sensor modules), power and propulsion (power supply units), cameras and surveillance systems, ground control systems (display/control panels) and counter-drone systems (radio frequency inhibitors).

Thanks to its robust ratchet coupling and IP68-rated sealing, the M Series SPE ensures a secure and reliable connection even in the most demanding environments. It provides a seamless, compact, and efficient solution for applications in UAVs, aerospace, automotive, and industrial automation.

items.notes: LEMO connectors are explicitly used in UAV communication systems (antenna emitters/receivers) and the M Series SPE targets high-speed data links in UAVs.

value.address: Chemin des Champs Courbes 28, 1024 Ecublens, Switzerland

evidence.snippet:
LEMO SA (HEADQUARTERS)
[Chemin des Champs Courbes 28, 1024 Ecublens, Switzerland](<https://maps.google.com/?q=Chemin des Champs Courbes 28, 1024 Ecublens, Switzerland>) [+41 21 695 16 00](<tel:+41 21 695 16 00>) [](fax:)[info@lemo.com](mailto:info@lemo.com) [Learn more](/en/subsidiary/lemo-sa-headquarters)

headquarters.notes: This is the global LEMO SA headquarters. LEMO USA, Inc. is a US subsidiary; no US address was found in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: LEMO products can be found in communication systems (antenna emitters/receivers), navigation systems (autopilot/sensor modules), power and propulsion (power supply units), cameras and surveillance systems, ground control systems (display/control panels) and counter-drone systems (radio frequency inhibitors).

LEMO provides SPE connector assemblies with pre-qualified cables, delivering optimal performance and reliability in demanding environments such as UAVs, aerospace, automotive, and industrial automation. Each assembly is fully tested to ensure compliance and durability, enabling high-speed data and power transmission for sensors, cameras, LiDAR, radar, actuators, communication modules, and real-time monitoring in autonomous systems and robotics.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: LEMO designs and manufactures precision circular connectors and cable assemblies sold as components that go into UAV communication, navigation, power, camera, and GCS subsystems.

evidence.snippet: Thanks to its robust ratchet coupling and IP68-rated sealing, the M Series SPE ensures a secure and reliable connection even in the most demanding environments. It provides a seamless, compact, and efficient solution for applications in UAVs, aerospace, automotive, and industrial automation.

LEMO designs, tests and manufactures high quality cable solutions which meet the demands of the most exacting applications and industries.
[Discover more](/en/cables)

products.notes: Core product families identified. Thousands of SKUs exist; only families listed here.

readiness.notes: LEMO operates a full production catalog with thousands of SKUs (e.g., 2278 M Series results, 759 F Series results, 618 00 NIM-CAMAC results), an online product finder, and supports sample and quote requests, indicating serial production at scale.

tagline: Swiss-headquartered manufacturer of push-pull circular connectors (ORIGINALS, REDEL, OPTIMA, SUPREME series) and technical cables serving defense, aerospace, and UAV applications. Production-ready across multiple environmental grades from standard to extreme. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of specific unmanned-systems contracts or programs is not evident.
